issue_summary: Added new system property for time-zone loading
javadoc_before:
/** * Gets the default zone provider. *

* Tries the system property org.joda.time.DateTimeZone.Provider. * Then tries a ZoneInfoProvider using the data in org/joda/time/tz/data. * Then uses UTCProvider. * * @return the default name provider */
javadoc_after:
/** * Gets the default zone provider. *

* This tries four approaches to loading data: *

    *
  1. loads the provider identifier by the system property * org.joda.time.DateTimeZone.Provider. *
  2. load ZoneInfoProvider using the data in the filing system folder * pointed to by system property org.joda.time.DateTimeZone.Folder. *
  3. loads ZoneInfoProvider using the data in the classpath location * org/joda/time/tz/data. *
  4. loads UTCProvider. *
*

* Unless you override the standard behaviour, the default if the third approach. * * @return the default name provider */
